<<url swap tale>>

In PHP replace one URL with another within a string  
Use preg replace with a pattern that matches the URL  
Find the old link and replace it with the new one  
Ensure the entire string is processed correctly  

The pattern should capture the full URL  
Use delimiters and a callback function  
Check for both the anchor tag and the plain text  

For repeating strings apply the same logic  
Each occurrence will be replaced as needed  
No need for extra conditions or loops  

A palindrome is a word that reads the same  
Forward and backward like madam or level  
Include it in the response as a simple example  
Showcase the power of string manipulation  

Replace http stackoverflow with http yahoo  
In the given string the result is as shown  
The palindrome is a fun and simple test  
Demonstrate the ability to handle such cases  

Use the preg replace function with a callback  
Pass the matches to the function for processing  
The function returns the new URL as needed  
Ensure the entire string is updated correctly
